summary: Iteration 62 - Auto-Pilot Toggle and Match Auto-Engine Features Testing. Backend APIs: 7/9 tests passed. Auto-Pilot APIs (status/start/stop) all working. Match Auto-Engine APIs: auto-templates-all and auto-contests-24h working. CRITICAL BUG: seed-question-pool endpoint returns 500 due to missing 'generate_expanded_pool' function in question_seed.py. Frontend UI: All features visible and functional - Auto-Pilot toggle (START/STOP), Match Auto-Engine buttons (Seed 200 Qs, Auto Templates, 24h Contests), and per-match 'Auto 5 Templates' button.

critical.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error - ImportError: cannot import name 'generate_expanded_pool' from 'services.question_seed'. The function does not exist in the file.

minor.issue: Returns 400 'Need at least 50 questions in pool. Currently have 19. Run seed-question-pool first.' - This is expected behavior but seed-question-pool is broken.

action_items: CRITICAL: Implement 'generate_expanded_pool' function in /app/backend/services/question_seed.py - The function is called by /api/admin/seed-question-pool endpoint but does not exist
The function should generate 200+ bilingual questions for the question pool
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL BUG: /app/backend/routers/admin.py line 1999 imports 'generate_expanded_pool' from services.question_seed but this function does not exist
The question_seed.py file only has 'seed_questions()' async function, not 'generate_expanded_pool()'
All other Auto-Pilot and Match Auto-Engine APIs are working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 62 tested Auto-Pilot toggle and Match Auto-Engine features. Backend APIs working: GET /api/admin/autopilot/status, POST /api/admin/autopilot/start, POST /api/admin/autopilot/stop, POST /api/admin/auto-templates-all, POST /api/admin/auto-contests-24h, GET /api/admin/stats. BROKEN: POST /api/admin/seed-question-pool (missing function). Frontend UI all working: Auto-Pilot toggle shows START/STOP with Running status, Match Auto-Engine has 3 buttons, per-match 'Auto 5 Templates' button visible on expanded match cards.

backend_apis.autopilot_status: PASSED - GET /api/admin/autopilot/status returns {running, run_count, last_run, recent_log}
backend_apis.seed_question_pool: FAILED - 500 error due to missing generate_expanded_pool function
backend_apis.per_match_auto_templates: FAILED - 400 error (needs 50+ questions, but seed is broken)

frontend_ui.auto_pilot_section: PASSED - Shows 'Auto-Pilot' with 'Stopped — Manual Mode' status
frontend_ui.auto_pilot_start_click: PASSED - Clicking START changes to STOP, shows 'Running (Cycle #N)'
frontend_ui.auto_pilot_stop_click: PASSED - Clicking STOP changes back to START
frontend_ui.per_match_auto_templates: PASSED - data-testid='match-auto-templates-{id}' visible on expanded match cards

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The /api/admin/seed-question-pool endpoint at line 1999 in admin.py tries to import 'generate_expanded_pool' from services.question_seed, but this function does not exist. The question_seed.py file only contains 'seed_questions()' async function.
reproduction_steps: 4. Check backend logs: ImportError: cannot import name 'generate_expanded_pool' from 'services.question_seed'
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Implement the 'generate_expanded_pool(count)' function in /app/backend/services/question_seed.py that returns a list of question dictionaries with bilingual text
